olive_intro: Sunny duplex with private pool, terrace, sea view, parking, and fast Wi-Fi.
onyx_intro: Modern duplex close to the sea — private pool, terrace, sea view, parking, and Wi-Fi.
meta_desc: Aura Adriatica — boutique duplex apartments Olive & Onyx in Lovran on the Opatija Riviera. Private pools, sea views, AC, fast Wi-Fi, private parking.
tagline: Two duplex apartments in Lovran — each with a private pool, sun terrace, garden, and sea view.
loc_p:
We are in Lovran, a picturesque coastal town at the foot of Učka mountain, right in the heart of Kvarner Bay on Croatia’s Opatija Riviera. This unique setting combines the charm of a historic seaside town with the natural beauty of lush forests and mountain trails above.
Just a short walk to the beach, the old town, and the famous Lungomare promenade, the apartments offer the perfect balance of relaxation and activity.
Both are duplex apartments with two bathrooms, designed for modern comfort and plenty of natural light. Each unit features a private pool, sunny terrace with BBQ, and private outdoor space with breathtaking sea or garden views. Inside, you’ll find bright, spacious interiors, fully equipped kitchens, and comfortable living areas — everything you need for a memorable stay.
about_p:
Welcome to our boutique duplex apartments in Lovran.
As passionate travelers, we created a place that offers the comfort and inspiration we look for when exploring the world.
Each of our two duplex apartments is designed for easy relaxation: private pool, spacious terrace, garden, and sweeping sea views — a perfect setting for an unforgettable stay on the Opatija Riviera.
Our philosophy is simple: modern comfort blended with the charm of Lovran’s history and nature, plus a warm, personal welcome for every guest.
We look forward to hosting you and sharing the beauty of Lovran.
contact_resp: We usually respond within a few hours.
gallery_intro: Discover Olive & Onyx and the beauty of the Opatija Riviera.
onyx_tag: Duplex · Private pool · Sea view · Parking
olive_short: Sun-drenched terrace, private garden and a quiet corner of the Riviera.
onyx_short: Private pool, panoramic sea-view terrace and the luxury of a secluded retreat.
contact_hero_sub: Send us an inquiry about availability and pricing. We respond quickly.
direct_booking_p: Book directly with us — no intermediary, no added fees. You get the best available rate and a personal welcome.

faq.a: Check-in from 15:00, check-out by 10:00. Late check-in is possible by prior arrangement — we use a digital security lock and send your personal PIN code before arrival.
3 free private parking spaces per apartment, directly on the property.
A 20% deposit confirms your reservation. The remaining balance is due upon arrival.
Each apartment has its own private pool exclusively for its guests. Pool water quality is checked weekly.
10 minutes' walk to Lovran's old town, the beach, and the Lungomare promenade.
Available on request at no extra charge. Please let us know when booking.
Gas Weber grill available on the terrace of each apartment.
Fully equipped kitchen with dishwasher and washing machine.
Included. Fresh bed linen and towels are provided for all guests.
Smoking is permitted in outdoor areas only. The apartment interior is smoke-free.
Air conditioning is available in all rooms and living areas.
